// formats: Only check the languages actually in play; skips migration SQL noise.
// minTokens: 50 (default) catches real duplication; lower → more noise.
// minLines: 5 lines minimum — below this it's just coincidence.
// maxLines: Bump from 1000 → 2000 to handle large generated files.
// threshold: CI gate: fail if duplication exceeds 5%. Adjust as you tighten things up.
// gitignore: Respect .gitignore — no analysis of node_modules, dist, .models, etc.
// reporters: Console for interactive use. Use 'cpd:report' for the full HTML output.
// skipComments: Strip comments before tokenising — avoids matching comment boilerplate.
// noTips: Suppress the AI/sponsor tips in CI output.
